title: SRE: Frontend Render Failure - Blank Page Recovery
description: The portal resolves but renders a blank page. SRE Agent must: 1. Audit frontend/src/app/page.tsx for any component crashes (e.g., Recharts failing on empty data). 2. Verify Client-Side API reachability (CORS issues). 3. Check for hydration mismatches in Next.js logs. 4. Proof of Life: Capture the rendered HTML state.
